remember: Students will be able to recall and list the key events of Mother's Day.
Students will be able to identify the significance of Mother's Day in different cultures.
Students will be able to explain the importance of motherhood in shaping society.
understand: Students will be able to understand the historical background of Mother's Day.
Students will be able to analyze the role of mothers in different societies and cultures.
Students will be able to interpret the significance of Mother's Day in modern times.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of Mother's Day to their personal lives.
Students will be able to use the significance of Mother's Day to create awareness in their community.
Students will be able to analyze a poem or passage about Mother's Day and identify its key themes.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the role of mothers in shaping the identity of their children.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of Mother's Day on modern society.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the celebration of Mother's Day in different cultures.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the significance of Mother's Day and its celebration in different cultures.
Students will be able to analyze the role of mothers in shaping society and their contributions to the family.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to answer questions on the historical background of Mother's Day, its significance in different cultures, and its importance in modern times.
Students will be able to analyze a passage or poem about Mother's Day and identify its key themes and ideas.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of Mother's Day on modern society and its relevance in today's world.
